extension.summary: Download Plex media for offline viewing/listening
extension.description: Adds a context menu option to download movies, TV shows, and music from PlexKodiConnect to your Kodi device for offline use. Supports downloading individual items, entire albums/seasons, or full artists/shows.

Stream audiobooks and podcasts from your Audiobookshelf server. Features include:
* Stream audiobooks (M4B, MP3, multi-file) * Stream podcasts with episode management * Progress sync with server * Download for offline playback * Chapter navigation * Resume playback * Search and add new podcasts * Find new episodes (from RSS) * API Key or Username/Password authentication
extension.news:
2026.7.24 - Separate libraries - CHANGED: Each Audiobookshelf library is now listed separately instead of merged into single Audiobooks/Podcasts folders. Enable "Group libraries by type" in settings for the old grouped view.
2026.7.10 - API key login - NEW: Optional API Key setting; when set it is used directly as the bearer token (no login/refresh) and overrides username/password.
2026.7.9 - Kodi repo compliance - Settings localized via strings.po; icon flattened (no transparency); LICENSE renamed to LICENSE.txt; fanart added.
2026.7.8 - Chronological offline queues - Downloads store the episode publish date so offline auto-play queues order chronologically, matching the online queue.
2026.7.7 - Auto-play: mixed streamed/downloaded - Auto-play queues mix streamed and downloaded episodes; also works fully offline. No resume dialog between episodes.
2026.7.6 - Auto-play next podcast episode - "Auto-play next episode" setting (default off) plays a native Kodi playlist from the selected episode forward. Progress tracked per episode.
2026.7.5 - Progress sync fix - Progress upload no longer loops forever; empty/non-JSON 2xx responses are treated as success.
2026.5.28 - Now-playing cover art, author, JWT auth - Covers/author on the now-playing screen; JWT auth with auto refresh (requires server v2.26.0+).

extension.summary: Run Home Assistant webhooks from Kodi
extension.description: Create webhooks and trigger them via Keymap Editor or Kodi events. Each webhook gets a unique ID that can be mapped to any button using Keymap Editor, or fired automatically on playback/system events (playback start/stop/pause, screensaver, Kodi start/stop).

extension.summary: Android device and Samsung DeX streaming with auto-detect
extension.description: Stream your Android device screen or the Samsung DeX desktop on Kodi using scrcpy. DeX display id is auto-detected; Virtual Desktop mode (--new-display) works without an active DeX session. Works with LibreELEC and desktop Linux.
extension.disclaimer: Requires USB debugging enabled on your Android device.
extension.news: v2026.6.12 - Samsung DeX + simpler menu - NEW: Samsung DeX mirroring with auto-detected display id - NEW: Virtual Desktop mode (--new-display) - desktop windowing without an active DeX session (One UI 7 / Android 15+) - NEW: Detect Displays menu action - CHANGED: menu collapsed to Stream Device / Samsung DeX / Virtual Desktop / Detect Displays / Settings - each asks USB vs WiFi only if an IP is configured, otherwise defaults to USB - FIXED: dropped removed --forward-all-clicks flag; uses --mouse-bind for scrcpy 2.0+ (forwards right/middle clicks) - UPDATED: bundled scrcpy 3.3.4 to 4.0 on x86_64 (SDL3, self-contained); aarch64 stays on 3.3.4 (no official arm64 build) - Inspired by TuxDex, without miraclecast/root/network changes

extension.summary: Synchronized playback across Kodi devices — a SyncLounge-style watch party
extension.description: Watch together in real time. One Kodi device hosts a party and others join with a room code; play, pause and seek are mirrored to everyone, with automatic drift correction so all players stay in sync. Works with library files, network shares and plugin streams that are resolvable on every device.
